name: detectors: bundle-budget.sh exits 1 when a route bundle exceeds the budget_kb option (per g-react-008 options_schema)
command: mkdir -p dist/routes && dd if=/dev/zero of=dist/routes/heavy.js bs=1024 count=300 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/bundle-budget.sh" --json --paths "dist/routes/*.js" --options '{"budget_kb":250,"per_route":true}'
